$schema_note: Canonical pool schema. The REAL pool (data/locations.json) is produced by tools/pool-builder with a Mapillary token. This sample exists so the app and server have a valid file to load before you build the real one. IMPORTANT: the image_ids below are placeholders — mapillary-js cannot render them. Replace this file (or generate data/locations.json) with real Mapillary image IDs to actually see panoramas.
